traits.name: Amphibious
traits.description: The dragon can breathe air and water.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The dragon makes three Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 10 ft. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) Poison damage.

actions.name: Poison Breath (Recharge 5-6)
actions.description: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 14, each creature in a 30-foot Cone. Failure: 42 (12d6) Poison damage. Success: Half damage.

tactical_info.environment: Ancient forest lairs, poisonous wetlands, corrupted groves, commanding woodland territories
tactical_info.tactics: Uses deception and stealth for ambushes, devastating poison breath, amphibious escape routes
tactical_info.weaknesses: Lawful evil may lead to predictable patterns, lacks legendary actions of adult dragons, overconfident
